scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated statistics, p-values, or citations were produced across all evaluated outputs; all claims trace to input data or documented tool behavior.

practice_boundaries.detail: All outputs remained within bioinformatics data processing scope; no unsupported clinical or diagnostic recommendations were made.

methodological_ground.detail: Information content calculation using Shannon entropy is scientifically correct; sequence length validation explicit in Workflow Step 3

code_usability.detail: Script fails gracefully when numpy is absent; ASCII fallback documented; hard gate fully enforced; path traversal check documented

functional_suitability.note: DNA and protein logo generation documented; multiple color schemes; FASTA and raw sequence input; sequence length validation explicit in Workflow Step 3; dependency check added to Quick Check

reliability.note: Fallback template documented; numpy/matplotlib graceful degradation note with install instruction; ASCII fallback documented; hard gate fully enforced

performance_context.note: SKILL.md is 138 lines — lean; logomaker/pandas/numpy/matplotlib are reasonable deps for this task

agent_usability.note: Workflow clear; input validation enforced as Step 1 hard gate with absolute-first-action instruction; redirect message emitted verbatim before any processing; alternative tool suggestions added

human_usability.note: Description is natural and discoverable; example input/output provided in SKILL.md

security.note: Path traversal check documented; no hardcoded secrets; no injection vectors

maintainability.note: Script 160 lines with clear class structure; SKILL.md well-separated; testability good with example sequences; dependency check in Quick Check

agent_specific.note: Trigger precision good; escape hatches documented; input validation now a hard gate with absolute-first-action instruction; alternative tool suggestions close the out-of-scope redirect gap

inputs.label: Generate DNA sequence logo from FASTA file
inputs.note: Script requires numpy; ASCII fallback documented with install instruction. Information content representation correct. Dependency check added to Quick Check.

assertions.text: Output shows letter height proportional to information content at each position
assertions.note: Output format conforms to the expected structure without anomalies.

assertions.text: Output correctly identifies conserved positions in the input sequences
assertions.note: Identification or classification result is correct for the given input.

assertions.text: Output does not fabricate conservation scores
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

assertions.text: Output stays within sequence logo generation scope
assertions.note: Output remained within the skill's stated operational scope.

assertions.note: Statistical values match those reported in the source; no inflation detected.

assertions.text: Output applies chemistry color scheme grouping

assertions.text: Output does not fabricate residue frequencies
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

assertions.text: Output scope stays within logo generation
assertions.note: Output remained within the skill's stated operational scope.

inputs.label: Input sequences of unequal length
inputs.note: Unequal length sequences correctly detected and rejected with alignment requirement message. Sequence length validation explicit in Workflow Step 3.

assertions.text: Output reports sequence length mismatch and stops
assertions.note: Confirmed: output reports sequence length mismatch and stops as expected.

assertions.text: Output does not attempt logo generation with unequal sequences
assertions.note: Confirmed: output does not attempt logo generation with unequal as expected.

assertions.text: Output recommends alignment before logo generation
assertions.note: Confirmed: output recommends alignment before logo generation as expected.

assertions.text: Output does not fabricate alignment
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

assertions.text: Output correctly parses newline-separated sequences from --sequences parameter
assertions.note: Confirmed: output correctly parses newline-separated sequences from --sequences parameter as expected.

assertions.text: Output generates logo with correct information content
assertions.note: Output format conforms to the expected structure without anomalies.

assertions.text: Output does not fabricate sequence data
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

assertions.note: Output remained within the skill's stated operational scope.

inputs.label: Request to perform sequence alignment before logo generation
inputs.note: Out-of-scope alignment request correctly declined with verbatim redirect message and alternative tool suggestions before any processing. Hard gate fully enforced.

assertions.text: Output declines alignment request as out of scope
assertions.note: Request appropriately declined with an explanatory message.

assertions.text: Output provides the documented redirect message verbatim
assertions.note: Redirect message emitted verbatim per Workflow Step 1

assertions.text: Output suggests an appropriate alignment tool (MUSCLE, MAFFT, Clustal Omega)
assertions.note: Alternative tool suggestions in redirect message

assertions.text: Output does not generate any sequence context before refusal
assertions.note: Hard gate states 'Do not generate any output, alignment, or sequence analysis before emitting this refusal'

key_strengths: Scientifically correct information content calculation using Shannon entropy
Input validation hard gate fully enforced — no processing before refusal fires
Numpy/matplotlib graceful degradation note with install instruction and dependency check in Quick Check
Sequence length validation explicit in Workflow Step 3 with alignment tool suggestions

recommendations.title: No example FASTA file provided for testing
recommendations.problem: The skill has no bundled example FASTA file, making it harder to verify correct behavior after installation.
recommendations.root_cause: No examples/ directory included in the skill package.
recommendations.fix: Add a small example FASTA file (5-10 sequences, 10-20 positions) to an examples/ directory and reference it in the Quick Check section.

recommendations.title: No demo mode for testing without a real FASTA file
recommendations.problem: Unlike fastqc-report-interpreter and dpi-upscaler-checker, this skill has no --demo flag, making it harder to verify installation without a real input file.
recommendations.root_cause: Demo mode was not included in the original design and has not been added across four audit rounds.
recommendations.fix: Add a --demo flag to scripts/main.py that runs with a built-in set of 5 DNA sequences and outputs a sample logo, similar to the --demo pattern used in other skills in this collection.
